prompt: /tdd build a user authentication system with registration, login, and password reset

assertions.text: Triggers the design gate (Phase 0) due to complexity
Produces a design summary with components, data flow, key decisions
Decomposes into at least 3 work units
Identifies dependencies between units (login depends on registration)
Each work unit goes through full RED→GREEN→review cycle
Runs a final integration test across all units
Report shows all work units with individual phase statuses
